title: Tinkers Oreganized
description: Makes Tinker's plate boots and Modular Golems float on lead
body:
# Tinkers Oreganized
Iron boots float on [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized) lead. [Tinker's Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) is no longer an exception!

Did you need this feature? No

Is it cool? Yes

## Features
- Tinker's iron boots float on lead
- [Modular Golems](https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-golems) with iron legs float on lead
- Performance-oriented design
- Highly configurable (use [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) for GUI)

## Roadmap
- [Truly Modular](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-armory) support

[![Available on Modrinth](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/modrinth/cozy.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-oreganized)
[![Available on CurseForge](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/curseforge/cozy.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-oreganized)
[![Available on Github](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/github/cozy.png)](https://github.com/DadamaldaDad/tinkers-oreganized)
